task.role: You are a Senior DevOps Engineer with expertise in Kubernetes, GitOps, and CI/CD. Implement Task 5 with production-quality code.

context.overview: Deploy Percona MongoDB operator for flexible integration configs and templates
context.background: This task is part of a larger project. Key resources: - PRD: .tasks/docs/prd.txt (full requirements and architecture) - Related tasks: 1 - Infrastructure config: Check ConfigMaps for connection strings

requirements.description:
1. Install Percona MongoDB operator
2. Create MongoDB replica set with 1 instance
3. Configure authentication and authorization
4. Create collections for integrations and templates
5. Set up backup policies

constraints.constraint: Match existing codebase patterns and conventions
Create PR with atomic, well-described commits
Include unit tests for new functionality
PR title format: feat(task-5): MongoDB Document Store Setup (Bolt - Kubernetes)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: All requirements from task description implemented
Code follows project conventions and style guide
MongoDB is running, accepts connections, can create/query documents in integrations collection

validation.command: kubectl get pods -n {namespace} - verify all pods running
kubectl get secrets - verify connection secrets created

deliverables.deliverable: Unit tests covering new code paths
